entry.title: NASA Shares How to Save Camera 370-Million-Miles Away Near Jupiter
entry.quote: With few options for recovery, the team turned to a process called annealing, where a material is heated for a specified period before slowly cooling.

entry.title: “You have 18 months”
entry.quote: We are so fixated on how technology will outskill us that we miss the many ways that we can deskill ourselves.
